clusterTitle: EQS-News: REPLOID has acquired a stake in Alimentastic with the option to obtain majority control
reason: Contaminated cluster: The cluster mixes multiple unrelated stories (REPLOID/Alimentastic transaction, RBI/Addiko updates, US tech/regulatory items). REPLOID/Alimentastic material consists solely of press release sourcing (EQS-News via OTS wire) with zero independent media confirmation. Stake percentage, transaction value, and Alimentastic background not disclosed in available headlines. Austrian company transaction with potential sector relevance, but sourcing too thin for draft article. Needs independent verification and additional context before publication consideration. RBI/Addiko items should route as update_story to existing published article, not processed here.
